recipe_id_777.title: Artisan Sourdough Loaf
recipe_id_777.instructions:
Step 1: Mix flour, water, and starter. Rest for 30 minutes.
Step 2: Add salt and perform stretch-and-folds over 2 hours.
Step 3: Shape the dough and proof overnight in the fridge.
Step 4: Bake at 230°C in a preheated Dutch oven for 45 minutes.

event_id_101.notes: Remember to feed the sourdough starter 8 hours before mixing!
